reviews.review_description: Gets very boring after a few mins. Worth a try for 99p. But wouldnt pay expensive for it

A refreshingly original wave shooter where your enemies are animated vegetables — yes, you read that right: carrots, corn, and more! The 360° free movement option adds great immersion and feels more intuitive than joystick-based locomotion. Sound design is spot-on, giving you clear cues about incoming threats from any direction.

Progression is well-balanced: tougher enemies become visually distinct with color changes, and your arsenal upgrades along the way. The shooting mechanics are clever — you can auto-aim (but it comes with slower reloads) or unleash your psychic energy for faster, more strategic play.

The veggie monsters are surprisingly charming, each with unique and entertaining animations. Overall, a fun and creative take on the wave shooter genre with just the right mix of humor and challenge!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the feedback! 🧠🌽 We’re glad you’re loving the 360° movement, sound design, and those mischievous veggies!

reviews.review_description:
Psychic Shooter is a surprisingly fantastic VR experience. It takes a ludicrously fun concept – battling killer vegetables – and executes it with polish, intensity, and a perfect understanding of what makes VR gaming special. The core loop is addictive, the powers are incredibly satisfying, and crucially, the vegetables are legitimately scary within the immersive context of VR.

It’s a fantastic blend of over-the-top action, dark humor, and genuine horror-lite thrills. If you own a VR headset and enjoy wave shooters with a unique twist, Psychic Shooter is a must-try.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the amazing review! 🧠🌽 We’re so glad you enjoyed the mix of over-the-top action, dark humor, and those unexpectedly scary veggies. It means a lot to hear PSYCHIC SHOOTER hit the mark as a fun and satisfying VR experience. Stay sharp — the veggies aren’t done yet! 🌟

reviews.review_description:
It is fun if you do not have wifi
and have nothing else to play

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5-star review! We’re glad you enjoyed playing PSYCHIC SHOOTER. Your support means a lot, and we hope you’ll continue having fun with it! 🌽
